issues.title: Concurrent profile API requests fail (0/20 success)
issues.rootCause: Playwright APIRequestContext does not persist cookies between requests by default. Each concurrent request is treated as unauthenticated because cookies are not shared across the promise pool.
issues.fix: The test harness needs to use browser context or pass auth headers explicitly. This is a test infrastructure issue, not an app bug. The actual app works correctly for authenticated sessions.
verificationSteps: Update test to use browser context for concurrent tests
Or pass Authorization header with each request
issues.regressionRisk: Low - this is a test infrastructure issue

issues.title: E2E tests timeout waiting for Profile tab navigation
issues.expectedResult: Profile tab should be clickable and content should load within 5 seconds
issues.actualResult: Timeout after 30 seconds - element not found
issues.rootCause: The Profile tab selector in tests doesn't match the actual button structure in the UI. The app uses a bottom navigation bar where tabs are identified differently.
issues.fix: Update test selectors to match actual UI structure. The Profile tab uses icon-based navigation at the bottom of the screen.
verificationSteps: Inspect actual tab selectors in the running app
Update test to use correct selectors
issues.regressionRisk: Medium - UI tests need correct selectors

issues.title: Profile name race condition - last write wins without warning
stepsToReproduce: Send two concurrent PATCH requests to /api/user with different names
issues.expectedResult: Either both succeed with last-write-wins OR one fails with conflict error
issues.actualResult: Both requests appear to succeed, but the test assertion failed
issues.rootCause: Race condition in profile update - last write wins but no optimistic locking or version check
issues.fix: Implement optimistic locking with version field or return 409 Conflict on concurrent modifications
verificationSteps: Add version/timestamp field to profile updates
issues.regressionRisk: Low - current behavior (last write wins) is acceptable for profile names

issues.title: Invalid credentials test expects different error format
stepsToReproduce: POST to /api/auth/signin with nonexistent email and wrong password
issues.actualResult: Test assertion failed - need to check actual error format
issues.rootCause: Test assumption about error format may not match actual API response
issues.fix: Update test to match actual API error response format

issues.title: Offline tests timeout - context.setOffline not working as expected
issues.expectedResult: Profile shows cached data when offline
issues.actualResult: Test times out waiting for elements
issues.rootCause: Offline mode test needs the page to be fully loaded before going offline. The 30s timeout suggests the initial page load is failing.
issues.fix: Ensure test waits for page to be fully loaded before going offline
issues.regressionRisk: Low - app has offline support via IndexedDB

supabaseChecks.userDeletionCleanup: partial - auth user deleted but cascade cleanup may be incomplete

blockingTickets.title: Test infrastructure needs browser context for auth
blockingTickets.description: Current APIRequestContext tests don't persist auth cookies. Need to either use browser contexts or explicit auth headers.
commands: // Now use page.request for authenticated API calls

blockingTickets.title: E2E selectors need to match actual UI
blockingTickets.description: Profile tab and other UI element selectors don't match the actual app structure. Need to inspect running app and update selectors.
commands: # Update selectors in test files to match:

recommendations.recommendation: Fix test infrastructure to properly handle authentication across concurrent requests
Add optimistic locking or conflict detection for profile updates
Implement application-level rate limiting for API endpoints
Add version field to profiles table for optimistic locking
Consider adding API-level request logging for audit trails
